playbook_name: SSH Brute Force: Password Guessing Playbook
snort_rule: alert tcp 192.168.10.50 any -> $HOME_NET 2222 (msg:"Campaign CAMP-SSH-BF-001 activity from 192.168.10.50 targeting port 2222: Brute Force: Password Guessing"; flow:to_server,established; threshold:type limit, track by_src, count 5, seconds 60; classtype:attempted-admin; priority:2; reference:url,attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1110/001/; sid:1075265; rev:1;)
sigma_rule:
title: 'Campaign CAMP-SSH-BF-001 Detection for Brute Force: Password Guessing'
status: experimental
logsource:
  category: network_traffic
  product: phantomnet
detection:
  selection:
    src_ip:
    - 192.168.10.50
    dst_port:
    - 2222
    protocol:
    - tcp
  condition: selection
level: high
tags:
- attack.t1110.001
- campaign
- attack.credential_access
